channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady after Sunday's rally, though full-fledged reversal may take longer
item.description: Bitcoin is holding above $63,000 after rallying on Sunday. The price is now hovering near a key 200-week moving average that often marks major cycle turning points.

item.title: Zcash teams propose Ironwood pool to restore supply verification after Orchard flaw
item.description: Ironwood would close the old Orchard pool to new activity and route funds through a turnstile before they enter a new shielded pool.

item.title: Gold slips below 200-day moving average offering glimmer of hope for bitcoin bulls
item.description: Gold falls into bear market territory, while a stronger U.S. dollar and rising rate expectations pressure risk assets.

item.title: U.S. inflation, European Central Bank rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 8.

item.title: CME is letting traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not price, and two firms have already placed bets
item.description: Monarq and DV Chain kick off trading in CME's bitcoin volatility index futures.

item.title: LATEST: 🏦 JPMorgan is turning cautious on crypto, warning Strategy’s cash reserves cover just 6.3 months of dividends and giving the CLARITY Act less than 50% odds of passing. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5WakdQazA4SmgxYWFQVlU1MmJsSXE2Xzh2S0lSZHBrZllLalg5b3R4aVQxVnVrNW5ZYVA5TUhYSWs2NGpZc1JhRURubzFHcE1ockh5VElTS3lzXy1mX3dFNGtfYlg?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 🏦 JPMorgan is turning …

item.title: Zcash bounces 45% as developers propose new 'Ironwood' upgrade
item.description: The plan would let anyone verify that no counterfeit coins are circulating, addressing the patched bug that triggered last week's crash. ZEC is still down about 22% on the week.

item.title: Bitcoin crashed. Bitcoin crashes are a recurring feature of crypto markets. Liquidation cascades, macro shocks, and excessive leverage can all trigger sharp drawdowns across the entire ecosystem. Our research team breaks down why Bitcoin crashes happen, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBfZGQzN0VDQnNOQnZ3blJFdzlJNmlQVHRwSGl1T1EtYXBqeTRCQWdSeDAxeTl3anNMOUxZeWQ2TjBxUTNQN1ZwcHpzY3hYcG9wZlJ1MjZkdS1POG8?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin crashed. Bitcoin crashes are a recu…

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
item.description: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.

item.title: Galaxy drops CLARITY Act odds to 60% as time is running out
item.description: Galaxy Digital says the Senate has a tight calendar ahead of the November elections, and the time needed to fix up and pass a key crypto bill is quickly fading.

item.title: XRP steadies above $1.10 to bounce from four-month lows
item.description: XRP recovered from four-month lows on elevated volume, but the token remains trapped below key resistance levels even as ETF inflows and exchange outflows continue to build.

item.title: Bitcoin's rally to $63,700 triggers $504 million losses for short sellers, most since late April
item.description: Traders betting against bitcoin lost $504 million over 24 hours as it bounced from below $60,000, though a fresh Iran-Israel flare-up pulled prices back on Monday.

item.title: Bitcoin spikes, then dumps, from $63,700 as analysts assess Strategy's next BTC moves
item.description: BTC, ETH, XRP and others pulled back from their overnight highs as Iran-Israel tensions and oil rally triggered risk aversion in Asian stocks.

item.title: I'll be the first to turn bullish on Bitcoin when the long-term technicals hit exhaustion and the trend turns. I've argued Q2/Q3 would mark the bottom based on historical bear-market structures. Its playing out that way. The relative setup is approaching very attracti - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE56Z2JDU0FxWEFfRVV4SG9PSXV0TE5hZDJYT2s5XzctVXVnYWpMWU9fTVRhTXJSMk9VdUZEQ0RMT09Db043UnFtQlJFNkFHdlAxNE5rTXFhUVltcHl5aUFqMXJaWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">I'll be the first to turn bullis…

item.title: Tokenization firm Securitize clears key SEC hurdle for NYSE listing
item.description: The firm announced that the US securities regulator has declared its S-4 registration statement effective, bringing it closer to a SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

item.title: Bitcoin falls back below $63,000 as Iran-Israel trade strikes and Korean stocks crash
item.description: BTC has pulled back from overnight highs as escalating geopolitical tensions weigh over risk sentiment and send oil price higher.

item.title: Justin Sun’s HTX delists Trump family’s USD1 amid freeze fight
item.description: HTX said World Liberty froze its addresses and has responded by delisting and suspending the platform’s token.

item.title: JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of shorts liquidated from the crypto market in the past 15 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5haXFrdmRvaEQwTXRJSlZyTlJZV08wOFBzRE83U0pQeFJGWmNVX2d4VTJWSEZKeGxTM0NDYzhYWlM4eXNadjZVNUNVTnRudE9raFVleEM1Zld5dnJZeW52S2d3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of sho…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin surges 5% to $64,000 after President Trump says Israeli PM Netanyahu has "no choice" but to accept an Iran deal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5nT3ZCdDVUZExIU1Z2X0FYT3dtMEhJM2p3RzJPaERHWkYtYjdqRTBIN1lQR0VQcENjU1ZSVUpDUzJfdTVPOFg1d19uM1YzOWlhNVlNM2JDOFczT3E4aW5BY09R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin surges 5% to $64,…

item.title: What happens to Bitcoin if Nasdaq falls further?
item.description: Bitcoin eyes a rally toward $92,630 as BTC defends key long-term support while the Nasdaq flashes deeper correction risks.

item.title: A quick review of the Ways and Means tax bills: State of Crypto
item.description: The House Ways and Means Committee is gearing up for its big tax push.

item.title: Strategy’s Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms
item.description: Strategy’s top execs took to social media on Sunday to tout its Bitcoin strategy while shareholders cast final votes on a proposal for twice-monthly preferred stock dividend payments.

item.title: It’s sad that all the rich people left crypto and it’s now the entire industry is just teenagers in America forcing poor people to do shameful things. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5YbzA3Q3lQZTdwMFVaTnNwenJ4T3BlTTFzVVp5cGxROVduNWMxOUNMZTNzdG1qN1NocXVZWnVEek1KU3M3bmlCaG51MjAzdHhlb2RTYVE4VklKRFFzMTRERQ?oc=5" target="_blank">It’s sad that all the rich people le…

item.title: Frontier AI Models Can Find Crypto's Biggest Bugs. Experts Warn the Industry Isn't Ready
item.description: The Zcash vulnerability uncovered with help from Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 signals a shift in who may discover critical flaws first.

item.title: Michael Saylor revives bitcoin-buy speculation as scrutiny over Strategy grows
item.description: The firm's executive chairman posted a familiar chart with Strategy's previous BTC purchases writing "a good time to add more dots."

item.title: Bitcoin near $60,000 today vs February: Institutional sentiment has flipped
item.description: Bitcoin’s return to $60,000 is drawing heavy ETF outflows, marking a sharp reversal from February when institutional selling eased into the dip.

item.title: Bitcoin's slide has no single cause. AI, tech IPOs, quantum, Strategy sale all play a role, NYDIG says
item.description: Not one, but several overlapping headwinds are hitting the crypto market at once, weighing on bitcoin's price, the firm's head of research Greg Cipolaro said.

item.title: Wall Street Is Coming for Hyperliquid's Perps Crown, Arthur Hayes Says
item.description: Arthur Hayes warned that Hyperliquid's core value driver—using trading fees to burn tokens—exposes the protocol to market share losses.

item.title: Abra’s Bill Barhydt says Wall Street’s next crypto bet is tokenization
item.description: As Abra prepares for a Nasdaq debut, CEO Bill Barhydt is betting tokenized yield products and onchain lending will drive the next phase of crypto wealth management.

item.title: Bitcoin risks new purge with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
item.description: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

item.title: Our corporate @Strategy is to increase net Bitcoin and Bitcoin per share over time. Rumors otherwise are just rumors. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5mOE8ySmdiQzNRVVJqMWd6TUVjRlhxWHRWNzhOMWNlR0FHcnhpLVR4RWtrUjdIU0NqbGFtNzl4SHYxY3ctRUJGb2VYdDFDMEU4YTNIWlhHV1hrLXpN?oc=5" target="_blank">Our corporate @Strategy is to increase net…

item.title: I think you are being provided misleading information. These “crypto entrepreneurs” you refer to were threat actors involved in high profile social engineering crypto fraud and data extortion. $18.9M of stolen funds was seized by law enforcement. 1) Danish Zulf - x.com

item.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Review: Better At What’s It Good At, Worse At What It’s Not
item.description: Anthropic's new flagship aced our math problem and shipped a spotless game—then drained our entire token quota in a single prompt. We ran it through six tests, and here's how it did.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts and departures aren't a crisis, Joe Lubin says
item.description: The Consensys leader told CoinDesk the Ethereum Foundation's role should be narrower and more focused on stewarding the network's core technology and values.

item.title: I’ll forever be bullish on crypto. I think we overestimated how quickly crypto would become the next major computing paradigm. A lot of people were searching for the next platform shift and assumed it would be crypto, but in many ways that ended up being AI. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1leGVZVGp1SmpXTXQ0cjVVREVyeHQxWk5mSW9kLTJxcVRfd2s1MlZXUnZvSEN0U0haS3d0WkNnTjN2cWdscFZrTHBfUHRpVXBLbEE3ejlob0dBZW9qV2xR?oc=5" target="_blank">I’ll forever be bullish on crypto. I t…

item.title: What's the biggest risk / problem for crypto right now? Global equity markets are ~$130 trillion Global fixed income ~$150 trillion Global real estate ~$300 trillion Gold ~$30 trillion Alts ~$30 trillion So +/- $640 trillion And crypto? $2 trillion. Less than Microsoft al - x.com

item.title: I'm imagining the bears who think that Bitcoin is so weak that if you buy 4% of it and talk a lot, you can destroy the whole network. It's not even a person, but a group. Bought 4%. Like, somehow the key weakness of Bitcoin is that if someone buys 4% of it, everyt - x.com

item.title: Centralized Crypto Exchange Spot Volume Fell to $679B in April, the Lowest Since October 2023 CryptoSlate, citing a CryptoQuant report, said centralized crypto exchange spot trading volume fell to $679 billion in April, the lowest level since October 2023. Th - x.com

item.title: CRYPTO RALLYING - x.com
item.description: CRYPTO RALLYING x…

item.title: AI Is Helping Discover Tech Vulnerabilities—And Zcash Is Just the Latest Example
item.description: Frontier AI models have evolved into bug-finding tools, uncovering vulnerabilities across the tech world—and now in crypto too.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether eye worst weekly rout since FTX collapse as cryptos shed $390 billion
item.description: A week that began with Strategy's bitcoin sale ended with one of the largest crypto market drawdowns in years.

item.title: Claude Code Vulnerability Could Let Attackers Steal Credentials From GitHub, Says Microsoft
item.description: Researchers say prompt injection attacks could manipulate AI coding agents to access sensitive credentials stored in software development pipelines.

item.title: Meta is paying creators in Stablecoins. Spending them is someone else's problem
item.description: Meta’s decision to pay creators in USDC validates stablecoins as a mainstream disbursement tool, Joslyn suggests, but it also exposes the industry’s unresolved problem: moving seamlessly from digital dollars to usable local currency.

item.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.

item.title: Bitcoin Has Dumped All of Its Gains Since Trump Was Reelected—And Then Some
item.description: Bitcoin surged in the wake of President Trump's reelection, pushing to new highs deep into 2025. Now it's down more than 50% from that peak.

item.title: America’s largest banks are building a new digital currency network to stop a massive deposit drain
item.description: America’s biggest banks are launching tokenized deposits to compete with stablecoins, opening a new front in the race to become the dominant form of cash on blockchain networks.

item.title: Don’t fall for false narratives - Equity bull market intact - Crypto only way for tokenization - Crypto key in a machine to machine AI world - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9WNEUzcWdxcG1hX3U1aWM5aGN2YzMtNFFBU05Vand4Xy1fV2t0b195ZGZJaDNFQVY1eHRtX0RrcS1aRGJFVHhsRnhOVWdYZDBudjRVbUlqSERXM3pXeDlv?oc=5" target="_blank">Don’t fall for false narratives - Equi…

item.title: A crypto pioneer who turned a $20 million family stake into a billion-dollar fund doubles down on bitcoin
item.description: Sourcing initial capital from his mother to build a $1 billion crypto empire, DFG CEO James Wo says market metrics do not support Tom Lee’s $250,000 ether prediction.

item.title: Meet the Guys Still Clinging To the Terra Luna That Do Kwon Abandoned
item.description: Terra Luna Classic was left behind after an epic collapse almost four years ago. But there’s a community of believers who haven’t given up.

item.title: All of you in the crypto cheap seats can keep dunking on Zcash for 'crashing' to the price six weeks ago, or you can instead learn something and spend your energy helping get your own crypto house in order for the AI & quantum risks ahead - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9IVkRqLW9Yd3A1aEtFN1hLOWtWYy1IS0x2VERDbTUzVGhrTENjSkZmc3NydnFYbUxkQW10REhWZTdkTS1HbHNpdU43eDJrS2h4Y1l4UXc5bFdSUF9uczZydHNXcw?oc=5" target="_blank">All of you in the crypto cheap s…

item.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin at center of $285 billion lawsuit moves after 14 years
item.description: The 1LwWt address received a legal notice from Salomon Brothers via Bitcoin's OP_RETURN field in July 2025 demanding the owner prove ownership by November 5, 2025.

item.title: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO - x.com
item.description: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO

item.title: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO - x.com

item.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug, Bitcoin below $60K: Is $1.4K next?
item.description: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

item.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
item.description: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

item.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
item.description: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

item.title: Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say
item.description: Fallout from a bug that enabled undetectable Zcash counterfeiting shows that privacy can sometimes present tradeoffs, experts say.

item.title: Strategy Shares Fall to 4-Month Low as STRC Dips and Bitcoin Sinks Under $60K
item.description: Strategy shares tumbled alongside Bitcoin on Friday as the firm's flagship preferred stock also came under pressure.

item.title: Adding even more fuel to the fire is the drawdown in crypto, with Bitcoin now down -53% since October. In fact, Bitcoin is down 20% this week ALONE, with crypto erasing ~$2.5 trillion since October 2025. The bear market gained momentum this week and crus - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
item.description: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?
